name: mythosforge-imageedit
description: Edit an image with a prompt (instruction img2img) or inpaint a masked region, via Replicate. Bring your own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN. No wallet, no payment.

image.note: path or URL to the input image

mask.note: inpaint only: path or URL to the mask (white = area to fill)

model.note: override the Replicate model slug for the op

output: JSON line on stdout: { ok, op, image, path, bytes }. Read `path` for the written file.

runtimes.tool-use-llm: hand tool-schema.json (openai or anthropic block) to the model; host runs invoke on the tool call. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Bankr LLM Gateway, Surplus, and any function-calling model.
